$Comment: Example FAMILY-GATED VARIANT overlay: 'horrific' stacks on TOP of a base rarity (so you get 'Horrific Epic Spider' = epic base * horrific overlay), and rolls ONLY on the spider family (native 'Spiders' NPCGroup, or any role matching 'Spider*' as a fallback). It grants the spider-exclusive 'venomous' affix. Delete this file (and Affixes/Venomous.json) to remove the example. Roll.Chance is this variant's ABSOLUTE spawn probability on an eligible mob (keep the chances of co-occurring variants summing to <= 1). Roll.AllowedRarities gates which BASE rarities it may overlay ('*' = any incl. a plain mob; e.g. ['epic','legendary'] = only on epic+). Multipliers stack MULTIPLICATIVELY on the base rarity, so keep them modest. AuraEffectId is a fallback body-tint applied ONLY when the base rarity has no aura (a plain-base horrific spider); a rarity-backed one keeps the rarity aura. BonusDropList stacks its venom loot on top of the rarity's drops.
Name: horrific
